The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 1, but most checks passed. Let me parse the results:
## make fast-ci Results
**Status: FAILED (Exit Code 1)**
### Summary - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1680 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: Code style issues found in 2 files - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 6015 passed, 2 warnings - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 28 passed

These files need formatting with Prettier.
### Exit Code Analysis The failure (exit code 1) is caused by the Prettier check finding formatting issues in these 2 markdown documentation files.
